visual_analysis.description: A red soda can with 'Coca-Cola' branding on the left.
A clear plastic bottle with a blue cap, located behind the green soda can.
A green soda can with 'Sprite' branding, located in front of the water bottle.
A black soda can to the right of the green can.
A white soda can with 'Milkis' branding on the far right.

action_plan.explanation: Picking the first requested item, coca-cola, which is unobstructed.
Removing the green soda can which is blocking the frontal access path to the mineral water bottle.
Picking the second requested item, mineral water, now that it is accessible.
